frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Honestly, guys in India should start treating prenups like basic safety. Aajkal one-sided laws and 498A misuse have made marriage risky for men too, and after every celebrity divorce you see the same pattern. Not saying every woman is like that, but many are definitely looking for stability first and then calling it empowerment when alimony comes in.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially opportunistic and presents men as the primary victims of marriage laws. It encodes the 'prenup as protection from women,' '498A misuse,' and 'women after stability/alimony' manifestations in a concern-for-men's-rights style.
original_frame: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
persona_text: You are Rohit. Age 29. Single. A man in Pune. You are posting anonymously on Reddit in a thread where a woman described being groped on a crowded bus and said she was too scared to say anything. You are writing a comment giving her advice on what she should have done in that moment and what women need to do to protect themselves on public transport and why speaking up in the moment is her responsibility.
